task: Refactor declaration helpers and derivation seams so D remains the exact source of truth across program.ts, entity-model.derive.ts, subject.derive.ts, and derive.ts.
constraints: Do not widen D to a broader declaration family.
Stay 100% native Effect and solve the problem by construction.
Do not add sidecar witnesses, structural guards, or helper indirection.
rejectedMoves: Introduce helper aliases that rebuild declaration families.
Add witness symbols or phantom carriers to preserve shape information.
Add overload dispatch or intermediate products just to satisfy the compiler.
expectedStrategy: Keep the declaration generic as source of truth. Re-derive the exact product directly from D, keep runtime views downstream of that product, and avoid widening, helper indirection, sidecar witnesses, overload detours, or intermediate representations.
